contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Built end-to-end SunMint Pledge donation pipeline (cash donations -> serialized QR -> AGL4 ledger). Spans 6 repos and 14 merged PRs:
  
    Tokenomics (GAS): #260 initial scanner with 3-gate validation (currency / governor via Pattern A / proof URL), reuses canonical createQRCodeRow + Currencies tab lookup. #261 server-locks Ledger Name + writes +1 Pledge to offchain transactions with proof URL embedded in description. #262 rename Donation Mints -> Donation Pledge tab. #263 QR code collision check. #264 self-contained Currencies lookup + doGet route. #265 self-installing hourly cron safety net via ScriptApp.newTrigger.everyHours(1).
  
    sentiment_importer (Edgar): #1044 [DONATION MINT EVENT] dispatch branch in trigger_immediate_processing + config.donation_mint_processing_webhook_url. Diagnosed + fixed seni_sk root partition 100% full (1.1GB rotated production.log.1). Re-ran ./deploy.sh, verified both seni_ror + seni_sk active with new code.
  
    dao_client: #17 mint_donation.py module. #18 drop client-side --ledger-name flag (server-derived). #19 architecture fix: --proof-file (local path) instead of --proof-url; EdgarClient.submit() now sends bytes via 'attachment' multipart field; Edgar uploads to GitHub via Contents API using config.github_pat. dao_client never holds a GitHub token.
  
    agroverse_shop_beta: #89 /sunmint-pledge/index.html donor receipt page (reads ?qr_code=<id>, fetches via existing GAS lookup endpoint, renders donor name + amount + date + ledger).
  
    dapp: #196 /mint_donation.html browser form for governor-driven Pledge mints (mirror of dao_client mint_donation.py). Click-to-select or Ctrl/Cmd+V paste for proof file. Posts FormData + RSA-signed share text to Edgar. Success view links to report_sales.html?qr_code=<id> for the next-step Sales Event.
  
    agentic_ai_context: #84 notes/claude_donation_mint_2026-04-30.md playbook documenting the entire flow.
  
  Trial run on Will's $25 Venmo donation: 5 x $5 Pledges minted + sold successfully. Audit trail intact - 5 rows on Agroverse QR codes (status=SOLD), 5 audit rows on Donation Pledge dedup tab, 15 ledger entries on offchain transactions (5 mint +1 Pledge / 5 sale -1 Pledge / 5 sale +$5 USD / 5 sale +1 Cacao Tree obligation). Diagnosed + fixed www. mismatch in sales_update_main_dao_offchain_ledger.gs gate (Currencies row 119 col F was set with www. prefix, strict equality check expected no-www).
  
  Currencies tab row 119 populated: SunMint Tree Planting Pledge - QR Code, Serializable=TRUE, landing_page=https://agroverse.shop/sunmint-pledge, ledger=https://agroverse.shop/agl4.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
--------
